subject: Super Saiyan warrior with arms raised overhead, channeling a massive energy sphere
description: A muscular humanoid figure in a tattered orange gi stands with arms raised high above their head, golden aura blazing around their entire body. The hair is spiked and golden, characteristic of a powered-up Super Saiyan transformation. The pose is a classic upward-thrust charge, arms fully extended, fists clenched. An intense yellow-gold energy radiates outward against a dark background. The figure's expression is not fully legible at this resolution but the body language reads as exertion and concentration.
foreground: muscular humanoid figure in orange gi with golden aura, arms raised overhead
background: dark void with radiating golden energy bursts
emotion: intense concentration and exertion; arms overhead in effort
